explanation: Current request claims patient is 'tamoxifen-naive'. Notes 009 (started 2021-03-20), 010 (continuing 2022-08-14, on tamoxifen 20mg daily), 011 (continuing 2023-04-18), and 014 (discontinued ~March 2025 due to side effects) document several years of tamoxifen exposure. Patient is post-tamoxifen, not tamoxifen-naive.

Current request is for the right breast (10 o'clock), but all prior breast disease has been documented on the LEFT side. May be appropriate (right-side biopsy is fine to perform) but worth confirming the request is intentional and not a side mix-up.

Patient has documented social-determinant burdens: transportation difficulties (note 001), declined chemo partly due to financial pressure and childcare gaps (note 007), recent widowhood and food insecurity (note 012). Not a contradiction with the request, but should accompany any treatment-decision document.
